deferred.objectives: Define after baseline weekly measurements exist.

deferred.normalizedGaugeFormulas: Define after baseline weekly measurements exist.

metrics.name: X followers
metrics.description: Current followers on @StablesCouncil.
metrics.indicatorRule: Community, user, or external response signal that Stables does not fully control.
metrics.sourceDetail: Manual public-mirror baseline from TwStalker search result: @StablesCouncil showed 117 followers, crawled 5 days before 2026-05-07. Replace with X API once X_BEARER_TOKEN is available.
metrics.feedNextStep: Add an X API bearer token to the server-side agent and pull user public_metrics plus recent post public_metrics into a local snapshot file.

metrics.name: X engagement actions
metrics.description: Likes, replies, and reposts on recent posts in the weekly measurement window.
metrics.indicatorRule: Community, user, or external response signal that Stables does not fully control.
metrics.sourceDetail: No automated snapshot exists and no manual value has been entered yet.
metrics.feedCadence: Weekly API or controlled manual pull
metrics.feedNextStep: Confirm the platform credential and API access level, then replace dashboard_manual_inputs.json with a server-side snapshot file.

framework.linkingRule: Navi item metrics[] must reference Dashboard metric ids; Dashboard relatedNaviItems[] must reference Navi item ids.
framework.firstReleaseMode: manual weekly baseline values with concrete sources
framework.indicatorRule: KPIs are outcome signals that Stables does not fully control. Controlled work items remain on the Dashboard as Operational Signals, not KPIs.

valueModes.computed: Derived from local website files, Navi data, Dapp tracker, version docs, or feedback files.
valueModes.snapshot: Collected by tools/collect-dashboard-snapshots.mjs from platform APIs, public endpoints, or structured local ledgers.
valueModes.manual: Entered in dashboard_manual_inputs.json because no local automatic source exists.
valueModes.manual-missing: Manual-only value intentionally not entered yet.

dataPullStatuses.wired-local: Already computed from local project files by the dashboard generator.
dataPullStatuses.live-api: Collected into a sanitized local snapshot by an authenticated or approved platform collector.
dataPullStatuses.public-snapshot: Collected from a public profile page; useful as an interim feed but lower confidence than an official API.
dataPullStatuses.api-candidate: Can likely be automated through a platform API or authenticated server-side fetch once credentials and permissions are configured.
dataPullStatuses.semi-structured: Has a recognizable source but still needs a stable parser or API pull.
dataPullStatuses.manual-now: Requires a weekly manual value until a stable external or internal feed exists.
